title: Consortium Budget Reallocation Memo (corrected ceilings)
body: CORRECTED total ceiling 487500 EUR after the consortium reallocated mid-season. Reconcile the final report against these corrected per-line ceilings, not the original May planning sheet. Vessel charter 120000; Dive operations subcontract 95000; Equipment 78000; Freelancers 64500; Travel 38000; Conservation 52000; Consumables 40000. Dive operations subcontract and Travel both run OVER their corrected ceilings.
